description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests Runner that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: linux-test and windows-test. The linux-test job should run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.11, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, building and installing, and running tests with pytest. The windows-test job should run on windows-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.11, checking out the code, setting up the MSVC dev environment, setting up Python, installing build dependencies, building a wheel, and running tests with pytest.
